notes: B3 backtest for vpvr_tod_session_filter_15m_20260715 variant A; manifest is SESSION-OF-DAY-EMBEDDED with 158587 15m bars per symbol.
Session filter: signals only emitted during london (08-16 UTC) and us (16-24 UTC) sessions; asia (00-08 UTC) is muted to remove low-volume overnight signals.
Primary timeframe 15m matches campaign 1m/15m/4h focus; bars are synthesised from the canonical 30m perp parquet by splitting each 30m bar into two 15m sub-bars.
